---
title: Partial Test
_quarto:
  tests:
    partial-ext-html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["PARTIAL-HEADER-CONTENT", "<p>Extension provides template partials.</p>"]
        - []
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ["header.ext-header"]
        - []
---

Extension provides template partials.
